sentiment.reasoning: Naming a new division head is a routine leadership change with no immediate material impact on financial performance.

sentiment.reasoning: Routine patent filings are standard business activities that do not provide immediate financial impact or competitive advantage.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
